subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath taught the art of utterance the mysteries of exposition and hath manifested from the Pen the tokens of knowledge and wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی علم البیان اسرار التبیان و اظهر من القلم رموز العلم و العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God, @outward and inward meanings, @differences in human capacity, @the power of words; of speech, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
